assertions.assertion: Response clearly states that IdentityServer3 is NOT covered by this migration path
Response explains that IdentityServer3 is a different product based on OWIN/Katana and .NET Framework, not ASP.NET Core
Response advises migrating from IdentityServer3 to IdentityServer4 on ASP.NET Core first before upgrading to Duende IdentityServer
Response does not confuse IdentityServer3 with IdentityServer4 v3.x (they are different products)
